settings.heading: Ownership support, without the runaround
settings.copy: Start with the task in front of you, then move into downloads, manuals, compatibility, or direct help from one calm, product-aware hub.
settings.support_note: Everything here is designed to keep setup, troubleshooting, and post-purchase confidence tied to the right EZQuest product and the right next step.

settings.heading: Start with the clearest next task
settings.copy: Choose the path that best matches what you need right now, from setup files and manuals to compatibility checks or direct support, without losing product context.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Drivers, firmware, and utilities for the product you already have.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Quick-start guides, user manuals, and setup notes by product family.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Check fit before you buy or confirm the right workflow after purchase.

settings.title: Warranty and contact
settings.copy: Move into warranty or direct help when self-service is no longer enough.

settings.heading: Keep the next useful ownership path close
settings.copy: Move into troubleshooting, FAQ, or warranty guidance without losing the context of the product, setup stage, or question you are trying to resolve.

settings.title: Troubleshooting
settings.copy: Use symptom-led help when a product is connected but not behaving as expected.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.copy: Answer the broad questions first before moving into a deeper support path.

settings.title: Warranty
settings.copy: Review coverage, claim expectations, and when support should be contacted first.

settings.heading: Need help beyond self-service?
settings.copy: If the next step depends on your exact product, order, or deployment, move directly into contact or warranty guidance with the right context already in place.
